design_philosophy: RPG Gamification meets high-end life coaching. The app should feel immersive, premium, and magical, using deep cosmic aesthetics with vibrant game-like elements (XP, Levels, Boss Battles). Every interaction should feel satisfying and polished like a top-tier mobile game.

glass_card.implementation: Expo BlurView (intensity 20, tint dark) wrapped in a View with borderRadius xl, borderWidth 1, borderColor border.subtle, and overflow hidden.
glass_card.usage: Use for the Life Map widgets, mission cards, and profile sections.

primary_button.implementation: TouchableOpacity with linear gradient background (Primary to darker shade), borderRadius full, and shadow glow_primary. Text should be Sora, bold, uppercase.
primary_button.usage: Main actions like 'Start Mission', 'Level Up', 'Upgrade Pro'.

circular_progress.implementation: react-native-svg with a background circle (rgba 255,255,255,0.1) and an animated strokeDashoffset for the foreground circle (accent color).
circular_progress.usage: 6 Life Area Rings on the Home Map.

text_input.implementation: View with background surface_glass, borderWidth 1, borderColor border.subtle, borderRadius lg, padding lg, text size body_lg.

animation_specs.page_transition: Fade and slightly scale up (0.95 -> 1.0) on mount using enter animations.
animation_specs.level_up: Use react-native-confetti-rig or build a custom particle emitter using Reanimated to shower gold and purple particles.
animation_specs.pulse_orb: Continuous withRepeat(withTiming(), -1, true) scale and opacity animation for the generating screen.
animation_specs.progress_fill: withTiming(value, { duration: 1500, easing: Easing.out(Easing.cubic) }) for life scores and XP bars.

screens.splash: Deep space background, animated logo from particles, pulsing 'Start' button.
screens.onboarding: One question per screen. Large inputs. Smooth transitions. Progress bar at top.
screens.generating_animation: Pulsing orb image in center, starfield background, 'Generating your LifeScript...' fading in and out.
screens.home_life_map: Header with Streak/XP, Bento-style glass cards for Today's Mission (span full), Weekly Quest, 6 Progress Rings grid, and AI Quote.
screens.mission_view: Focused timer UI. Green/Purple accents. Complete button triggers confetti.
screens.profile: Avatar at top, level/XP prominent, grid of badges.
screens.share_card: Wrapped-style layout. Vertical cosmic background, oversized typography, data vis of life score.
screens.pro_upgrade: Split screen layout. Gray/Blurred without Pro vs Vibrant Color/Particles with Pro. Countdown timer prominent.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs) MUST include a data-testid attribute for automated testing. Example: testID='start-mission-button'

instructions_to_main_agent: Build standard React Native (.js) components. Do not use Next.js or HTML tags (div, span).
Ensure the app is mobile-first, targeting a base width of 390px (use Dimensions API or standard RN flexbox).
Use standard React Native StyleSheet for styling, referencing the colors and scales provided in this JSON.
Implement the 'Glass Card' effect heavily for all modular UI blocks on the Home/Life Map screen.
Ensure 60fps animations for transitions, pulsing elements, and progress bars using react-native-reanimated.
Do NOT use text emojis as icons (except for the avatar picker and streak fire). Use vector-icons exclusively.
Bind data-testid/testID to all touchables for test automation.
